subject: [PATCH v2 17/28] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds notification handlers for directory events in the NFS daemon (nfsd). It introduces a new fsnotify group for directories and modifies existing code to use this new group when handling directory-related events. The patch also creates a CB_NOTIFY request for directory change events and allocates a nfsd_notify_event object to handle notifications. If any delegation is affected by the event, it recalls the delegation if necessary. This patch aims to improve notification handling in the NFS daemon, particularly for directory changes.
